event: Classical couple with lyre — Algae and Boniface
description: A young couple in classical dress reclines together on a terrace overlooking the sea. The woman wears a white gown and holds a lyre, while the young man with a laurel wreath in his hair leans close. A small table with a mirror and scattered roses sits nearby. The scene is framed in a circular tondo format within a golden-brown square border. The palette is soft with warm skin tones, blues, greens, and golds.
